# Christopher Brasington

> Personal site of Christopher Brasington, a software engineer at the Denver
> Museum of Nature & Science in Denver, Colorado. Portfolio of open-source
> projects and personal writings.

## Main pages

- [Home / project portfolio](https://chrisincode.com/): professional work
  (dmns.org, kiosks, member app) and dozens of open-source projects — manga
  and ebook tools, Obsidian utilities, gaming tools, Discord bots.
- [Morrowind Modlist for OpenMW](https://chrisincode.com/mods/): curated
  modlist and settings for OpenMW.
- [Tales of Greater Morrowind](https://chrisincode.com/morrowind/): character
  stories from Morrowind playthroughs.
- [10 Games to Get to Know Me](https://chrisincode.com/gaming/ten): personal
  gaming history.
- [Reducing psychological hooks of the modern internet](https://chrisincode.com/attention/):
  practical guide to blocking algorithmic feeds and reclaiming attention.

## Elsewhere

- [GitHub](https://github.com/chrisbrasington)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/brasington/)
